title: Bánh Bò Nướng

groups.heading: Bản của chị Tôi · Chị Tôi's Version
Bản của chị Thiết · Chị Thiết's Version

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch round cake pan or bundt pan with oil or butter.
Beat the eggs and sugar together until well combined. The mixture should become thick and pale.
Add the coconut milk and vanilla, mixing on low speed until just combined.
Sift the tapioca starch into the batter and fold in gently until smooth. The batter should be pourable but not too thin.
Crush the Alka-Seltzer tablets into a fine powder. Fold it into the batter quickly and pour immediately into the prepared pan.
Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, until the top is golden brown and a skewer comes out clean.
Let cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then turn out onto a rack. When sliced, you should see the beautiful honeycomb pattern of air tunnels running through the cake.
Slice into wedges and serve at room temperature.
